name: Yuji itadori
description: Yuji is a modern day sorcerer who was breed to have mutiple techniqes, most of his primary ones include the shrine technique which gives him dismantle and cleave, then blood manipulation which lets him do alot but he uses piercing blood the easyist, these attacks paired with his incredible strength and soul touching ablitly makes him an extremly strong sorcerer.

moves.name: Soul strike
moves.desc: Yuji punches his opponent reaching their soul

moves.name: Cleave
moves.desc: Yuji grabs his opponent either on the legs or arms and uses cleave cutting their body and their soul

moves.name: Piercing blood 🩸
moves.desc: using blood manipulation shoots out a beam of blood cutting anyone who it hits

damage.name: black flash chain
damage.desc: Yuji hits you with 1-5 black flashes touching your soul each time

damage.name: Domain expansion,Benevolent Shrine
damage.desc: Yuji hits your soul having a full conversation with your soul in the blink of an eye stunning your fakemon, while also hitting your soul with his cleave technique multiple times
